items.title: Competitor A adds emergency roof repair page
items.summary: Competitor A published a new service page around emergency roof repair and same-day response.
items.why_it_matters: This may signal a push into urgent-intent search terms that convert well for local contractors.
items.recommended_action: Review the client's emergency repair page and consider a stronger FAQ or service-area section.

items.title: Local home show opens sponsor applications
items.summary: A local home and garden event appears to be accepting sponsor/vendor applications for the next event cycle.
items.why_it_matters: This could be a lead-gen and brand visibility opportunity if the audience overlaps with homeowners.
items.recommended_action: Decide whether the client should request vendor pricing or sponsor details this week.

items.title: Review velocity dips for Demo Local Roofing
items.summary: Manual review check shows fewer new Google reviews this week compared with the prior two-week pace.
items.why_it_matters: Review velocity is a visible trust signal for local searchers and can affect sales confidence.
items.recommended_action: Ask the agency/client whether a post-job review request push is already running.
